scripts.build: pnpm --filter @trumpet/shared build && pnpm --filter @trumpet/api build && pnpm --filter @trumpet/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @trumpet/shared lint && pnpm --filter @trumpet/api lint && pnpm --filter @trumpet/web lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @trumpet/shared build && pnpm --filter @trumpet/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @trumpet/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @trumpet/shared build && pnpm --filter @trumpet/shared test && pnpm --filter @trumpet/api test && pnpm --filter @trumpet/web test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @trumpet/shared build && pnpm --filter @trumpet/shared test:coverage && pnpm --filter @trumpet/api test:coverage && pnpm --filter @trumpet/web test:coverage
